name: ExtensionEncounterHistory_ActualPeriod
title: R5: The actual start and end time associated with this set of values associated with the encounter (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EncounterHistory.actualPeriod` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EncounterHistory.actualPeriod` 0..1 `Period`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EncounterHistory.actualPeriod` 0..1 `Period`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EncounterHistory.actualPeriod` has a context of Encounter based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Encounter`.
Element `EncounterHistory.actualPeriod` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The actual start and end time associated with this set of values associated with the encounter (new)

element.short: The actual start and end time associated with this set of values associated with the encounter
element.definition: The start and end time associated with this set of values associated with the encounter, may be different to the planned times for various reasons.
